release_notes: spawn UNKNOWN at chrome:launch and fingerprint:probe fixed by chdir to C:\Windows around the spawn calls — libuv on Windows degrades CreateProcessW to UV__UNKNOWN when cwd contains non-ASCII chars. Install lifecycle ETA: synthetic from elapsed/percent, stays visible across all phases instead of disappearing after the download. Saved badge in Settings: opaque 1.0s then 500ms opacity fade (was 2.5s hard cut).
